textPlain: The Lumafield scans images are pretty, but I did not see any complete copper runs showing, as were clearly visible in the release by TimeTube.  So I doubt the Lumafield scan data would be anywhere near as useful as the TimeTube data drop.
Why doesn’t the foundation release schematics?  Their moat is buying hundreds of thousands of SoCs from broadcom, not their motherboard designs.
Jonathan Clark?...of Crack Dot Com fame?
Because Broadcom.It seems the biggest success of the foundation is to whitewash Broadcom's image and further normalise closed proprietary systems that have the appearance of being open.
